Package com.langfuse.client.resources.commons.types

Class ScoreConfig.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.langfuse.client.resources.commons.types.ScoreConfig.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
ScoreConfig._FinalStage, ScoreConfig.CreatedAtStage, ScoreConfig.DataTypeStage, ScoreConfig.IdStage, ScoreConfig.IsArchivedStage, ScoreConfig.NameStage, ScoreConfig.ProjectIdStage, ScoreConfig.UpdatedAtStage
Enclosing class:
ScoreConfig
public static final class ScoreConfig.Builder extends Object implements ScoreConfig.IdStage, ScoreConfig.NameStage, ScoreConfig.CreatedAtStage, ScoreConfig.UpdatedAtStage, ScoreConfig.ProjectIdStage, ScoreConfig.DataTypeStage, ScoreConfig.IsArchivedStage, ScoreConfig._FinalStage
